name: SV Hafen United
style: Possession-based 4-2-3-1. Patient build-up, switch play, weak to high press.
weaknesses: No plan B vs low block
last_match: 2-1 loss to FC Metall Nord (Hinrunde). Conceded from a channel run by Hartmann after pressing their CB into a mistake.

key_players.name: Sven Mahler
key_players.note: Hesitant under pressure, tends to play long when pressed — that's where we win the second ball.

key_players.name: Robert Fass
key_players.note: Slow to turn. If Hartmann peels into the channel, Fass can't recover.

key_players.name: Kai Bohn
key_players.note: Good shield but doesn't like being pressed from behind. Riedel should mark him when we have the ball.

name: TSV Bergland
style: Direct 3-5-2. Long balls to twin strikers, wingbacks provide width. Compact mid-block.
weaknesses: No pressing structure — passive out of possession
last_match: 0-0 draw. We struggled against their mid-block — couldn't break them down. Need more patience in build-up.

key_players.name: Uwe Stahl
key_players.note: Aggressive stepper — if he steps, Wendt finds the pocket behind him.

key_players.name: Mike Dorn
key_players.note: Gets forward but doesn't track back fast. Krüger pins him, 10 underlaps.

key_players.name: Lars Pfeiffer
key_players.note: Big, physical, wins headers. Kross needs to match him physically, Vogt covers.

name: FC Südwest Stern
style: Counter-attacking 4-4-2. Deep block, absorb pressure, counter with two fast wingers.
weaknesses: Deep block can be pulled apart by switches
Vulnerable to overloads on both flanks
last_match: 1-0 win for Stern. We had 70% possession, couldn't score. They countered from a lost transition — Heil was caught high.

key_players.name: Tom Engel
key_players.note: Great shot-stopper, weak distribution. Press him and he'll go long — second ball is ours.

key_players.name: Jan Köhler
key_players.note: Rapid counter threat. Auer must stay compact, no overlapping. 1v1 only.

key_players.name: Max Ritter
key_players.note: Poacher, stays central. Kross marks him tight, Vogt sweeps.
